/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/opencl_wrapper/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/opencl_wrapper/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/opencl_wrapper/platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/opencl_wrapper/program.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/parser/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/parser/codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/parser/semantic_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyOpenCLProject.dir/src/runtime/executor.cpp.o -o MyOpenCLProject  /usr/lib64/libOpenCL.so
